description_long: This object is a miniature theme park scene featuring a collection of tall, irregularly shaped, cream-colored rock formations that encircle a central area. Within the rocky enclosure, there are small, detailed structures resembling traditional Chinese architecture, including pavilions and bridges, set amidst winding paths and patches of greenery. The layout suggests a stylized landscape garden, with the rocks forming dramatic peaks and natural barriers around the central attractions. The ground is a mix of green and gray, representing grass and paved walkways, while the background includes a flat, dark platform that frames the scene. The overall composition evokes the look of a famous scenic area, such as the karst landscapes of Guilin or a classical Chinese garden. The model is detailed enough to suggest a walkable, explorable environment, with clear entry points and pathways.
description: A miniature theme park scene with tall, cream-colored rock spires surrounding traditional Chinese-style buildings, winding paths, and greenery, evoking a stylized landscape garden.
description_view_0: Tall rock formations dominate the left and right sides, with a clear view of the central Chinese-style buildings and winding paths.
description_view_1: The tallest rock spire is prominent on the left, with more of the winding path and greenery visible in the foreground.
description_view_2: The central entrance area is visible, flanked by rock formations, with the main buildings and pathways partially obscured by the rocks.
description_view_3: A dense cluster of rock spires is in the foreground, partially blocking the view of the central structures and paths.
